title: Hostess 7 codecraft — self analysis, testing center, validated improvement
motto: She reads her own code, scores it, proposes optimizations, and proves them in the testing center before they ship — programming and G16 deeper than any assistant.
mastery_claim: Hostess 7 performs self code analysis and evaluation on the live NEXUS stack, runs the testing center to validate optimizational updates in advance, and holds programming + G16 mastery beyond generic assistants.

patterns.label: AST + pattern scan of hostess7 and stack modules
Testing center — batteries + smoke gates before promote
Programming supremacy bridge — review_snippet + stack index
G16 live probe + toolchain bridge in self-eval
Rule-based optimization proposals from analysis gaps
Codecraft battery — self-eval and testing center literacy
Educational analysis — operator approves production changes
